task_completion.description: Locate and open the parent product 'Spade' in the Product window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere Product window is open and the product 'Spade' is selected or displayed as the active record.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Substitute tab for the selected product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Substitute' (or 'Product Substitute') tab is active at the bottom or side panel of the Product window.
The 'Substitute Product' field in the substitution record form contains the value 'Hoe'.

task_completion.description: Set the name of the substitution record to 'Alternative for Spring'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field in the substitution record form contains exactly 'Alternative for Spring'.

task_completion.description: Set the description of the substitution record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field in the substitution record form contains 'Suggest when Spade is out of stock' (or at least includes 'out of stock').

task_completion.description: Save the new product substitution record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved successfully' status indicator is visible, or the newly created substitution record is visible in the list view of the Substitute tab.

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere web GUI to configure the product substitute.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the iDempiere web interface in a browser, rather than terminal windows or psql database prompts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with actual form fields in the ERP system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into the standard iDempiere input fields, not written into a text editor, notepad, or a separate script.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application logic using direct SQL inserts.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands like 'INSERT INTO m_substitute...' are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The parent product must be 'Spade' and the substitute product must be 'Hoe'. The substitution record's Name field must exactly match 'Alternative for Spring'. The Description field must contain the phrase 'out of stock' (specifically 'Suggest when Spade is out of stock').
